  1. Home
  2. Custom Signs
  3. A-Frame Signs

Custom A-Frame Signs

Maintenance free custom sidewalk signs

 

These adaptable, corrugated plastic signs each come in stunning full color, with sturdy sign holders. They are waterproof and also make excellent sidewalk business cards! You can choose to advertise with one or all four of our sign product options. We also sell replacement signs.

Double-sided sandwich signs are terrific for vehicle and foot traffic.  They’re also  weather and wind resistant —  and virtually maintenance free.

Small businesses and retail stores can each benefit from using these cost-effective, versatile custom printed products. Plus, they’re a snap for movable outdoor advertising. For some helpful design tips, read our blog about How to Design a Sidewalk Sign..

Easily design and order any of these products using our online design tool. Begin your order today.

Frequently Asked Questions

What do people call an A-frame sign?

A-frame signs are also commonly called sandwich board signs or sidewalk signs.

What are A-frame signs made of?

Our A-frame signs use corrugated plastic sign panels printed in full color and paired with sturdy sign holders.

Are A-frame signs waterproof and weather-resistant?

Yes—these signs are waterproof and designed to be weather- and wind-resistant for outdoor use.

Are A-frame signs double-sided?

Yes—double-sided sandwich signs are available for visibility from both foot and vehicle traffic directions.

What is the largest A-frame sign size available?

The Signicade and Signicade Deluxe signs are available in 36" × 24".

Can I order replacement signs for my A-frame frame?

Yes—replacement signs are available and are easy to swap in for new promotions or menu changes.

Can I design my A-frame sign online?

Yes—create your sign using our online design tool and order directly on the product page.

Can I request a proof and what are your production times?

Yes—request a PDF proof and production starts after approval if a proof is requested. Production options range from 1–5 business days, and orders approved after 5:00 PM CST are processed the next business day. Delivery time includes production plus shipping.

Why Choose Banners.com?

Customer Service

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

Fast Turnaround

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

 

Quality Products

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

Live Order Tracking

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
